text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: So who're you watching in today's race?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Do you even have to ask? Considering the current
lineup, it's obviously Eishin Flash!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, true. She's the only logical choice, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Keisei Hai, and the amount of
attention Eishin Flash is getting is rather high
compared to the competition.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The audience seems to be favoring me not for my
skill, but by default.
choice_data_list:
That doesn't change the fact that they expect
great things from you.

That doesn't change the fact that they expect
great things from you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That is true, and for that, I want to meet their
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In fact... I should naturally be able to do so just
being myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This race is a no more than a checkpoint along my
path. I cannot afford to stumble here.
choice_data_list: Run like you normally do, and you'll be fine.
Run like you normally do, and you'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, that's right. I will do what must be done.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
After this will be the first Classic Triple Crown
race—the Satsuki Sho.
